name: wealth-engine-mobile
description: Capacitor wrappers for Wealth Engine games hub and freelancer tools

scripts.sync:games: node sync-www.mjs games && cd games && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:tools: node sync-www.mjs tools && cd tools && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:receipt-rush: node sync-www.mjs receipt-rush && cd receipt-rush && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:webhook-whack: node sync-www.mjs webhook-whack && cd webhook-whack && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:invoice-stack: node sync-www.mjs invoice-stack && cd invoice-stack && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:uptime-defender: node sync-www.mjs uptime-defender && cd uptime-defender && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:freelancer-memory: node sync-www.mjs freelancer-memory && cd freelancer-memory && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:color-switch-snake: node sync-www.mjs color-switch-snake && cd color-switch-snake && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:horseshoe-toss: node sync-www.mjs horseshoe-toss && cd horseshoe-toss && npx cap sync
scripts.android:games: cd games && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:tools: cd tools && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:receipt-rush: cd receipt-rush && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:webhook-whack: cd webhook-whack && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:invoice-stack: cd invoice-stack && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:uptime-defender: cd uptime-defender && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:freelancer-memory: cd freelancer-memory && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:color-switch-snake: cd color-switch-snake && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:horseshoe-toss: cd horseshoe-toss && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.ios:games: cd games && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:tools: cd tools && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:receipt-rush: cd receipt-rush && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:webhook-whack: cd webhook-whack && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:invoice-stack: cd invoice-stack && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:uptime-defender: cd uptime-defender && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:freelancer-memory: cd freelancer-memory && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:color-switch-snake: cd color-switch-snake && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:horseshoe-toss: cd horseshoe-toss && npx cap sync ios
scripts.open:android:games: cd games && npx cap open android
scripts.open:ios:games: cd games && npx cap open ios
